skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: If (x, y) is a solution to the system of equations above where x > 4, what is the value of x?
rationale: Setting x2 − 7x + 10 = 4 gives x2 − 7x + 6 = 0. Factor: (x − 1)(x − 6) = 0, so x = 1 or x = 6. Since x > 4, x = 6.
